headline: INTRODUCING THE BLANK CANDLE
body: It's a candle. It smells like nothing. That's the point. Minimalism isn't a lifestyle, it's a purchase you make repeatedly.

headline: GET PAID TO HAVE A FACE
body: Our AI determines your influencer potential based on jaw symmetry and willingness to hold products near your head. Apply now.

headline: HYDRATE SMARTER, NOT HARDER
body: Our crystal-charged, moon-blessed, algorithm-optimized water has 47% more hydration energy. Peer-reviewed by our intern.

headline: YOUR MORNING ROUTINE IS WRONG
body: You're waking up like an amateur. Our 14-step sunrise protocol includes journaling, cold plunges, and silently judging your past self.

headline: THE $400 PLAIN WHITE T-SHIRT
body: Hand-stitched by someone who went to art school. The fabric is organic. The price is emotional. You deserve this.

headline: RENT A FRIEND FOR $79/HR
body: Tired of meaningful human connection? Our professionally trained companions will laugh at your jokes and never ask to borrow money.

headline: AI-GENERATED NOSTALGIA
body: Miss memories you never had? Our algorithm creates fake childhood photos so convincing you'll cry at Thanksgiving. Satisfaction guaranteed.
